generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf#"

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance ProjectedPathTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor collecting speed, acceleration, and steering angle data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor sensor measuring motor speed and torque",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorData
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo sensor measuring steering angle and position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoData
]

instance RawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateInformation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed and steering data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorDataInformation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor operational data including speed and torque",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance SteeringServoDataInformation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo data including angle and position",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCProcessingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for ACC processing including lead vehicle detection and speed calculation",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudOffloadingEnabler
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving paths, and object tracks"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of system reports from collected data for monitoring and troubleshooting"
]

instance ReducedECULoad : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reduced computational load on onboard ECUs through cloud offloading"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for Adaptive Cruise Control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate emergency braking function",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for pre-processing raw sensor data including unit conversions and serialization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CloudOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC processing to cloud infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via a user interface (UI) with reporting capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "transferring ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) to cloud infrastructure to alleviate resource-constrained on-board ECUs",
    DTDFVocab:provides ReducedECULoad
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "enabling operators to control ACC functions (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking) from remote locations",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time data display. Part of User Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel for remote ACC management. Part of User Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance DataManagementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data management component for handling incoming data streams. Part of Digital Twin Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance ControlMechanismsComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control mechanisms for ACC functions. Part of Digital Twin Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Front-End for sensor data collection. Part of Physical Twin Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Front-End for raw data processing. Part of Physical Twin Entity ROS2 package"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component for object detection and tracking. Hosted in Physical Twin Entity as ROS2 node"
]

instance ProjectedPathGenerator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component generating projected driving path for ACC. Hosted in Digital Twin Entity as ROS2 node"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataManagementComponent, ControlMechanismsComponent, ProjectedPathGenerator
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, DataPreProcessingFE, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle retrofitted with advanced sensor and control technology for ACC in ADAS",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by hardware limitations despite some standards requiring stricter synchronization (less than 100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages with ROS2 nodes. The system organizes components into User, Digital Twin, and Physical Twin Entities, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality beyond resource-specific tasks, and communication between entities is managed via ROS2-based node interactions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP as the transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (defining Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Interoperability is supported through OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control operations."
]
